statement: Reviewed the merge-authorization gate design and this exact commit (README + workflow + MUTATION.md/CLAUDE.md wiring) with Claude across this session. Understand and accept that this replaces an unsatisfiable GitHub review requirement with an explicit, commit-bound, single-operator authorization, and that this is NOT independent review. Authorize merging this exact commit into main.
non_claims: This authorization covers only commit 224c7ae2711e8a9497f4f5dcd753f800e73b740c; any new commit requires a new authorization file.
This does not certify the workflow logic is bug-free beyond the four local test cases already run — only that the operator reviewed and approved this exact commit.
